rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend Due To Attorneys Fault [C.C.P. Sec. 473(B)]
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday May 6, 2016, line 1. PETITIONER LOUISE DOUGLAS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Sustaining Demurrer Without Leave To Amend Due To Attorneys Fault [C.C.P. Sec. 473(B)] GRANTED, with sanctions payable to the Court of $450.00. = (501/REQ)
